productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherite Beige Backpack
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets allowing you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun!Height: 35 cmWidth: 31 cmDepth: 10 cmMade of leatherette for durabilityHas one main compartment with woven cords on the mouth to pull and close      One inner zipper and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentialsLong adjustable strap woven through loops at the back for carrying easeZipper pocket on the front, at the back and both the sides for additional space                                    Metallic embellishment with brand name on the frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
